flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Coastline Community College rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.0k → $11.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Coastline Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.2k → $1.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Coastline Community College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (27.5% vs 33.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Coastline Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (9.8% → 0.0%).
